content:
**🎁DC 20000守密人達成禮 / DC20000 Keepers Achievement Gift**

今天《忘卻前夜Morimens》DC全球頻道已經達到20000人！感謝大家的加入與陪伴，讓DC社區從0到1000、10000，再到如今的20000人。這個積極的信號讓我們充滿了幹勁和動力💖
未來我們會繼續打磨好遊戲，聽取守密人的訴求與建議，持續為大家帶來更多有趣的內容！

感謝每一位守密人的喜愛與陪伴，守密人可複製下方兌換碼在【設置】→【賬戶】→【兌換碼】處領取~

**🔹兌換碼：**GIFTFORYOU
**🔹禮包內容：**銀芯×1000、流明之芯×5
**🔹有效期**至2025年7月4日 23:59:59

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

《忘卻前夜Morimens》DC Global Channel reached 20000 Keepers! Thank you all for joining and staying with us, growing the DC community from 0 to 1,000, 10,000, and now to 20,000 members. This positive sign fills us with energy and motivation 💖
In the future, we will continue to polish the game, listen to the requests and suggestions of the keeper and keep bringing you more interesting content!

Thank you to every keeper for your love and company. You can copy the redemption code below and go to [Settings] → [Account] → [Redemption Code] to receive it~

**🔹 Redemption Code：**GIFTFORYOU
**🔹 Gift package content: **Silver × 1000, Lumen Core × 5
**🔹 Valid **until 23:59:59 on July 4, 2025 23:59:59

@everyone
